cards.back: A supervised deep learning architecture that combines convolutional neural networks and lateral connections for image classification tasks

cards.front: What is the main advantage of LetNet-5?
cards.back: It reduces the number of parameters and computations required for image classification tasks

cards.front: What is the purpose of lateral connections in LetNet-5?
cards.back: To share information between different regions of the image and improve the accuracy of the model

cards.front: What type of neural network is LetNet-5 based on?
cards.back: A combination of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and lateral connections

cards.front: What is the primary use case for LetNet-5?
cards.back: Image classification tasks, particularly on datasets with varying scales and rotations
